---
title: "StatisticalTest"
author: "Haruaki Sato"
date: "2025-10-09"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
install.packages("exactRankTests")
library(exactRankTests)
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC <- prep_FindMarkers(merged.obj_ViscMN_afterQC)
merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3@active.assay='SCT'
IEGs.to.plot =  c("Fos","Arc","Egr1","Npas4","Homer1","Fosb","Nr4a1","Dusp1")

```

```{r}
# Fig2d
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(openxlsx)

obj <- merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3

# cluster情報をmetadataへ追加
meta_df <- obj@meta.data
meta_df$Cluster <- as.character(Idents(obj))

# Fos発現量を取得
meta_df$Fos <- FetchData(obj, vars = "Fos")[, 1]

# IEG_score列名を確認してください
# 例: "IEG_score" という列がmetadataにある場合
score_col <- "IEG_score1"

# 条件順を指定
meta_df$Condition <- factor(
  meta_df$Condition,
  levels = c("Ctrl", "Cold", "2DG")
)

# 1クラスター内でWilcoxon + Holm補正を行う関数
run_cluster_tests <- function(df, value_col) {
  
  comparisons <- list(
    c("Ctrl", "Cold"),
    c("Ctrl", "2DG")
  )
  
  res <- map_dfr(comparisons, function(comp) {
    
    df_sub <- df %>%
      filter(Condition %in% comp) %>%
      filter(!is.na(.data[[value_col]]))
    
    n_ctrl <- sum(df_sub$Condition == "Ctrl")
    n_treat <- sum(df_sub$Condition == comp[2])
    
    if (n_ctrl == 0 | n_treat == 0) {
      pval <- NA_real_
    } else {
      pval <- wilcox.test(
        df_sub[[value_col]] ~ df_sub$Condition,
        exact = FALSE
      )$p.value
    }
    
    tibble(
      comparison = paste(comp[2], "vs Ctrl"),
      variable = value_col,
      n_ctrl = n_ctrl,
      n_treat = n_treat,
      mean_ctrl = mean(df_sub[[value_col]][df_sub$Condition == "Ctrl"], na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_treat = mean(df_sub[[value_col]][df_sub$Condition == comp[2]], na.rm = TRUE),
      median_ctrl = median(df_sub[[value_col]][df_sub$Condition == "Ctrl"], na.rm = TRUE),
      median_treat = median(df_sub[[value_col]][df_sub$Condition == comp[2]], na.rm = TRUE),
      p_value = pval
    )
  })
  
  res %>%
    mutate(
      p_adj_holm = p.adjust(p_value, method = "holm")
    )
}

# 全クラスター × Fos
fos_res <- meta_df %>%
  group_by(Cluster) %>%
  group_modify(~ run_cluster_tests(.x, "Fos")) %>%
  ungroup()

# 全クラスター × IEG_score
ieg_res <- meta_df %>%
  group_by(Cluster) %>%
  group_modify(~ run_cluster_tests(.x, score_col)) %>%
  ungroup()

# 結合
all_res <- bind_rows(fos_res, ieg_res) %>%
  arrange(variable, as.numeric(Cluster), comparison)

# xlsx出力
write.xlsx(
  all_res,
  file = "Fos_IEGscore_Wilcoxon_Holm_by_cluster.xlsx",
  rowNames = FALSE
)
```


```{r}
# Fig2d bonferroni
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(openxlsx)

obj <- merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3

# cluster情報をmetadataへ追加
meta_df <- obj@meta.data
meta_df$Cluster <- as.character(Idents(obj))

# Fos発現量を取得
meta_df$Fos <- FetchData(obj, vars = "Fos")[, 1]

# IEG_score列名を確認してください
# 例: "IEG_score" という列がmetadataにある場合
score_col <- "IEG_score1"

# 条件順を指定
meta_df$Condition <- factor(
  meta_df$Condition,
  levels = c("Ctrl", "Cold", "2DG")
)

# 1クラスター内でWilcoxon + Holm補正を行う関数
run_cluster_tests <- function(df, value_col) {
  
  comparisons <- list(
    c("Ctrl", "Cold"),
    c("Ctrl", "2DG")
  )
  
  res <- map_dfr(comparisons, function(comp) {
    
    df_sub <- df %>%
      filter(Condition %in% comp) %>%
      filter(!is.na(.data[[value_col]]))
    
    n_ctrl <- sum(df_sub$Condition == "Ctrl")
    n_treat <- sum(df_sub$Condition == comp[2])
    
    if (n_ctrl == 0 | n_treat == 0) {
      pval <- NA_real_
    } else {
      pval <- wilcox.test(
        df_sub[[value_col]] ~ df_sub$Condition,
        exact = FALSE
      )$p.value
    }
    
    tibble(
      comparison = paste(comp[2], "vs Ctrl"),
      variable = value_col,
      n_ctrl = n_ctrl,
      n_treat = n_treat,
      mean_ctrl = mean(df_sub[[value_col]][df_sub$Condition == "Ctrl"], na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_treat = mean(df_sub[[value_col]][df_sub$Condition == comp[2]], na.rm = TRUE),
      median_ctrl = median(df_sub[[value_col]][df_sub$Condition == "Ctrl"], na.rm = TRUE),
      median_treat = median(df_sub[[value_col]][df_sub$Condition == comp[2]], na.rm = TRUE),
      p_value = pval
    )
  })
  
  res %>%
    mutate(
      p_adj_holm = p.adjust(p_value, method = "bonferroni")
    )
}

# 全クラスター × Fos
fos_res <- meta_df %>%
  group_by(Cluster) %>%
  group_modify(~ run_cluster_tests(.x, "Fos")) %>%
  ungroup()

# 全クラスター × IEG_score
ieg_res <- meta_df %>%
  group_by(Cluster) %>%
  group_modify(~ run_cluster_tests(.x, score_col)) %>%
  ungroup()

# 結合
all_res <- bind_rows(fos_res, ieg_res) %>%
  arrange(variable, as.numeric(Cluster), comparison)

# xlsx出力
write.xlsx(
  all_res,
  file = "Fos_IEGscore_Wilcoxon_Bonferroni_by_cluster.xlsx",
  rowNames = FALSE
)
```


```{r}
# Fig2e　Bonferroni

library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(openxlsx)

obj <- merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3

# ===============================
# 1. metadata作成
# ===============================

meta_df <- obj@meta.data

# active.identをCluster列として追加
meta_df$Cluster <- as.character(Idents(obj))

# SPN_subtype列を使う場合はこちらでもOK
# meta_df$Cluster <- as.character(meta_df$SPN_subtype)

# Fos発現量を取得
meta_df$Fos <- FetchData(obj, vars = "Fos")[, 1]

# IEG_score列名
score_col <- "IEG_score1"

# cluster 6,7,8に絞る
meta_df_sub <- meta_df %>%
  filter(Cluster %in% c("6", "7", "8")) %>%
  filter(ConditionSex %in% c(
    "CtrlM", "ColdM", "2DGM",
    "CtrlF", "ColdF", "2DGF"
  ))

# ===============================
# 2. 検定関数
# ===============================

run_cluster_sex_tests <- function(df, value_col) {
  
  comparisons <- list(
    c("CtrlM", "ColdM"),
    c("CtrlM", "2DGM"),
    c("CtrlF", "ColdF"),
    c("CtrlF", "2DGF")
  )
  
  res <- map_dfr(comparisons, function(comp) {
    
    ctrl_group <- comp[1]
    treat_group <- comp[2]
    
    df_sub <- df %>%
      filter(ConditionSex %in% comp) %>%
      filter(!is.na(.data[[value_col]]))
    
    n_ctrl <- sum(df_sub$ConditionSex == ctrl_group)
    n_treat <- sum(df_sub$ConditionSex == treat_group)
    
    if (n_ctrl == 0 | n_treat == 0) {
      pval <- NA_real_
    } else {
      pval <- wilcox.test(
        df_sub[[value_col]] ~ df_sub$ConditionSex,
        exact = FALSE
      )$p.value
    }
    
    tibble(
      comparison = paste(treat_group, "vs", ctrl_group),
      variable = value_col,
      control_group = ctrl_group,
      treatment_group = treat_group,
      n_control = n_ctrl,
      n_treatment = n_treat,
      mean_control = mean(
        df_sub[[value_col]][df_sub$ConditionSex == ctrl_group],
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      mean_treatment = mean(
        df_sub[[value_col]][df_sub$ConditionSex == treat_group],
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      median_control = median(
        df_sub[[value_col]][df_sub$ConditionSex == ctrl_group],
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      median_treatment = median(
        df_sub[[value_col]][df_sub$ConditionSex == treat_group],
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      p_value = pval
    )
  })
  
  res %>%
    mutate(
      p_adj_holm = p.adjust(p_value, method = "bonferroni")
    )
}

# ===============================
# 3. clusterごとに検定
# ===============================

fos_res <- meta_df_sub %>%
  group_by(Cluster) %>%
  group_modify(~ run_cluster_sex_tests(.x, "Fos")) %>%
  ungroup()

ieg_res <- meta_df_sub %>%
  group_by(Cluster) %>%
  group_modify(~ run_cluster_sex_tests(.x, score_col)) %>%
  ungroup()

# ===============================
# 4. 結果を統合
# ===============================

all_res <- bind_rows(fos_res, ieg_res) %>%
  mutate(
    Cluster = factor(Cluster, levels = c("6", "7", "8")),
    comparison = factor(
      comparison,
      levels = c(
        "ColdM vs CtrlM",
        "2DGM vs CtrlM",
        "ColdF vs CtrlF",
        "2DGF vs CtrlF"
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(Cluster, variable, comparison)

# ===============================
# 5. xlsx出力
# ===============================

write.xlsx(
  all_res,
  file = "Fos_IEGscore_Wilcoxon_Bonferroni_cluster6_7_8_by_ConditionSex.xlsx",
  rowNames = FALSE
)
```













```{r}
# Fig1k
library(dplyr)

meta_df <- merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3@meta.data
meta_df$Cluster <- Idents(merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3)

clusters <- unique(meta_df$Cluster)

result_list <- list()

meta_df$Sex <- factor(
  meta_df$Sex,
  levels = c("Female", "Male")
)

for(cl in clusters){

  # そのclusterかどうか
  in_cluster <- meta_df$Cluster == cl

  # 2x2 table作成
  tbl <- table(
    Sex = meta_df$Sex,
    InCluster = in_cluster
  )

  # Fisher検定
  test <- fisher.test(tbl)

  # 結果保存
  result_list[[as.character(cl)]] <- data.frame(
    Cluster = cl,
    P_value = test$p.value,
    Odds_ratio = test$estimate
  )
}

sex_bias_df <- bind_rows(result_list)

# 多重検定補正
sex_bias_df$Adjusted_P <- p.adjust(
  sex_bias_df$P_value,
  method = "holm"
)

sex_bias_df

# write.csv2(sex_bias_df, "Fig1k_statistics.csv")
```


```{r}
# EDFig2f
#クラスター6の割合がCondition間で変化しないことを証明する
library(dplyr)

meta <- merged.obj_SPN_woQIHLPS_afterQC3@meta.data

meta$Condition <- case_when(
  grepl("^Ctrl", meta$ConditionSex) ~ "Ctrl",
  grepl("^Cold", meta$ConditionSex) ~ "Cold",
  grepl("^2DG",  meta$ConditionSex) ~ "2DG"
)

meta$Cluster6 <- meta$SPN_subtype == 6

tab <- table(
  meta$Condition,
  meta$Cluster6
)

tab



# 3比較をまとめて実行
pair_list <- list(
  c("Ctrl","Cold"),
  c("Ctrl","2DG"),
  c("Cold","2DG")
)

result <- lapply(pair_list, function(x){

  tmp <- tab[x, ]

  ft <- fisher.test(tmp)

  data.frame(
    Comparison = paste(x, collapse = " vs "),
    OddsRatio = unname(ft$estimate),
    Pvalue = ft$p.value
  )
})

result_df <- do.call(rbind, result)

result_df


# Holm 補正
result_df$P_adj <- p.adjust(
  result_df$Pvalue,
  method = "holm"
)

result_df
write.csv2(result_df,"EDFig2f_statisticas.csv")
```

```{r}
# Fig2g
# Fisher exact検定
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)

# Fisher exact test用の集計
fisher_df <- df %>%
  filter(
    SPN_subtype == 6,
    Condition %in% c("Cold", "2DG"),
    segments %in% segment_levels,
    !is.na(segments)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Fos_status = ifelse(Fos_positive, "Fos_positive", "Fos_negative")
  ) %>%
  count(
    segments,
    Condition,
    Fos_status,
    name = "n"
  ) %>%
  complete(
    segments,
    Condition = c("Cold", "2DG"),
    Fos_status = c("Fos_positive", "Fos_negative"),
    fill = list(n = 0)
  )

# segmentごとにFisher exact test
fisher_res <- fisher_df %>%
  group_by(segments) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
    
    tab <- xtabs(
      n ~ Condition + Fos_status,
      data = .x
    )
    
    test <- fisher.test(tab)
    
    tibble(
      Cold_Fos_positive = tab["Cold", "Fos_positive"],
      Cold_Fos_negative = tab["Cold", "Fos_negative"],
      DG_Fos_positive = tab["2DG", "Fos_positive"],
      DG_Fos_negative = tab["2DG", "Fos_negative"],
      odds_ratio = unname(test$estimate),
      p_value = test$p.value
    )
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    p_adj_BH = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"),
    p_adj_Holm = p.adjust(p_value, method = "holm")
  )

fisher_res

```
